members.name: BlitRect
members.signature: public void BlitRect(Rect2i rect, Texture2D source, Color modulate, int mipmap, Material material)
members.summary: Draws to given [param rect] on this texture by copying from the given [param source]. A [param modulate] color can be passed in for the shader to use, but defaults to White. The [param mipmap] value can specify a draw to a lower mipmap level. The [param material] parameter can take a ShaderMaterial with a TextureBlit Shader for custom drawing behavior.

members.name: BlitRectMulti
members.signature: public void BlitRectMulti(Rect2i rect, Texture2D[] sources, DrawableTexture2D[] extraTargets, Color modulate, int mipmap, Material material)
members.summary: Draws to the given [param rect] on this texture, as well as on up to 3 DrawableTexture [param extra_targets]. All [param extra_targets] must be the same size and DrawableFormat as the original target, otherwise the Shader may fail. Expects up to 4 Texture [param sources], but will replace missing [param sources] with default Black Textures.

members.name: GenerateMipmaps
members.summary: Re-calculates the mipmaps for this texture on demand.

members.name: GetUseMipmaps
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if mipmaps are set to be used on this DrawableTexture.

members.name: SetFormat
members.summary: Sets the format of this DrawableTexture.

members.name: SetUseMipmaps
members.summary: Sets if mipmaps should be used on this DrawableTexture.

members.name: Setup
members.signature: public void Setup(int width, int height, int format, Color color, bool useMipmaps)
members.summary: Initializes the DrawableTexture to a White texture of the given [param width], [param height], and [param format].

values.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBA8
values.summary: OpenGL texture format RGBA with four components, each with a bitdepth of 8.

values.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBA8_SRGB
values.summary: OpenGL texture format RGBA with four components, each with a bitdepth of 8. When drawn to, an sRGB to linear color space conversion is performed.

values.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBAF
values.summary: OpenGL texture format GL_RGBA32F where there are four components, each a 32-bit floating-point value.

values.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBAH
values.summary: OpenGL texture format GL_RGBA16F where there are four components, each a 16-bit "half-precision" floating-point value.

constants.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBA8
constants.summary: OpenGL texture format RGBA with four components, each with a bitdepth of 8.

constants.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBA8_SRGB
constants.summary: OpenGL texture format RGBA with four components, each with a bitdepth of 8. When drawn to, an sRGB to linear color space conversion is performed.

constants.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBAH
constants.summary: OpenGL texture format GL_RGBA16F where there are four components, each a 16-bit "half-precision" floating-point value.

constants.name: DRAWABLE_FORMAT_RGBAF
constants.summary: OpenGL texture format GL_RGBA32F where there are four components, each a 32-bit floating-point value.
